c.FacilityId, c.TenantId, s0.ClaimId, s0.TotalCharge, s0.TotalInsBalance, s0.TotalPatBalance, s0.TotalBalance
            FROM Claim AS c
            LEFT JOIN 
            (
                SELECT s.SrvClaFID AS ClaimId, COALESCE(SUM(s.SrvCharges), 0.0) AS TotalCharge, COALESCE(SUM(s.SrvTotalInsBalanceCC), 0.0) AS TotalInsBalance, COALESCE(SUM(s.SrvTotalPatBalanceCC), 0.0) AS TotalPatBalance, COALESCE(SUM(s.SrvTotalBalanceCC), 0.0) AS TotalBalance
                FROM Service_Line AS s
                WHERE ((s.TenantId == @__ef_filter__ScopedTenantIdForQuery_0) && (s.FacilityId == @__ef_filter__ScopedFacilityIdForQuery_1)) && (((s.TenantId == @__tenantId_0) && (s.FacilityId == @__facilityId_1)) && s.SrvClaFID IS NOT NULL)
                GROUP BY s.SrvClaFID
            ) AS s0 ON c.ClaID == s0.ClaimId
            WHERE ((c.TenantId == @__ef_filter__ScopedTenantIdForQuery_0) && (c.FacilityId == @__ef_filter__ScopedFacilityIdForQuery_1)) && ((c.TenantId == @__tenantId_0) && (c.FacilityId == @__facilityId_1))
            ORDER BY c.ClaID DESC
            OFFSET @__p_2 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_3 ROWS ONLY) | Resolver: c => new RelationalCommandCache(

            FROM Claim AS c
            LEFT JOIN 
            (
                SELECT s.SrvClaFID AS ClaimId, COALESCE(SUM(s.SrvCharges), 0.0) AS TotalCharge, COALESCE(SUM(s.SrvTotalInsBalanceCC), 0.0) AS TotalInsBalance, COALESCE(SUM(s.SrvTotalPatBalanceCC), 0.0) AS TotalPatBalance, COALESCE(SUM(s.SrvTotalBalanceCC), 0.0) AS TotalBalance
                FROM Service_Line AS s
                WHERE ((s.TenantId == @__ef_filter__ScopedTenantIdForQuery_0) && (s.FacilityId == @__ef_filter__ScopedFacilityIdForQuery_1)) && (((s.TenantId == @__tenantId_0) && (s.FacilityId == @__facilityId_1)) && s.SrvClaFID IS NOT NULL)
                GROUP BY s.SrvClaFID
            ) AS s0 ON c.ClaID == s0.ClaimId
            WHERE ((c.TenantId == @__ef_filter__ScopedTenantIdForQuery_0) && (c.FacilityId == @__ef_filter__ScopedFacilityIdForQuery_1)) && ((c.TenantId == @__tenantId_0) && (c.FacilityId == @__facilityId_1))

            LEFT JOIN 
            (

                WHERE ((s.TenantId == @__ef_filter__ScopedTenantIdForQuery_0) && (s.FacilityId == @__ef_filter__ScopedFacilityIdForQuery_1)) && (((s.TenantId == @__tenantId_0) && (s.FacilityId == @__facilityId_1)) && s.SrvClaFID IS NOT NULL)
                GROUP BY s.SrvClaFID

            FROM Claim AS c
            LEFT JOIN 
            (
                SELECT s.SrvClaFID AS ClaimId, COALESCE(SUM(s.SrvCharges), 0.0) AS TotalCharge, COALESCE(SUM(s.SrvTotalInsBalanceCC), 0.0) AS TotalInsBalance, COALESCE(SUM(s.SrvTotalPatBalanceCC), 0.0) AS TotalPatBalance, COALESCE(SUM(s.SrvTotalBalanceCC), 0.0) AS TotalBalance
                FROM Service_Line AS s
                WHERE ((s.TenantId == @__ef_filter__ScopedTenantIdForQuery_0) && (s.FacilityId == @__ef_filter__ScopedFacilityIdForQuery_1)) && (((s.TenantId == @__tenantId_0) && (s.FacilityId == @__facilityId_1)) && s.SrvClaFID IS NOT NULL)
                GROUP BY s.SrvClaFID
            ) AS s0 ON c.ClaID == s0.ClaimId
            WHERE ((c.TenantId == @__ef_filter__ScopedTenantIdForQuery_0) && (c.FacilityId == @__ef_filter__ScopedFacilityIdForQuery_1)) && ((c.TenantId == @__tenantId_0) && (c.FacilityId == @__facilityId_1))
            ORDER BY c.ClaID DESC
            OFFSET @__p_2 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_3 ROWS ONLY,

[s0].[TotalInsBalance], [s0].[TotalPatBalance], [s0].[TotalBalance]
FROM [Claim] AS [c]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [s].[SrvClaFID] AS [ClaimId], COALESCE(SUM([s].[SrvCharges]), 0.0) AS [TotalCharge], COALESCE(SUM([s].[SrvTotalInsBalanceCC]), 0.0) AS [TotalInsBalance], COALESCE(SUM([s].[SrvTotalPatBalanceCC]), 0.0) AS [TotalPatBalance], COALESCE(SUM([s].[SrvTotalBalanceCC]), 0.0) AS [TotalBalance]
    FROM [Service_Line] AS [s]
    WHERE [s].[TenantId] = @__ef_filter__ScopedTenantIdForQuery_0 AND [s].[FacilityId] = @__ef_filter__ScopedFacilityIdForQuery_1 AND [s].[TenantId] = @__tenantId_0 AND [s].[FacilityId] = @__facilityId_1 AND [s].[SrvClaFID] IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY [s].[SrvClaFID]
) AS [s0] ON [c].[ClaID] = [s0].[ClaimId]
WHERE [c].[TenantId] = @__ef_filter__ScopedTenantIdForQuery_0 AND [c].[FacilityId] = @__ef_filter__ScopedFacilityIdForQuery_1 AND [c].[TenantId] = @__tenantId_0 AND [c].[FacilityId] = @__facilityId_1
ORDER BY [c].[ClaID] DESC
OFFSET @__p_2 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_3 ROWS ONLY
